fields.title: Freeze autoresearch contract with regression tests
fields.description: Lock down the behavior tau must preserve before any architecture work lands. Cover the actual external contract and the failure cases most likely to regress during the port: JSONL replay, multi-segment config headers, workingDir resolution, METRIC parsing, autoresearch.sh enforcement, checks_failed gating, confidence scoring, and /autoresearch lifecycle behavior.
fields.design: Add focused tests for repo, service, and adapter seams using fixture JSONL/log strings and fake execution boundaries rather than live shell or git. Keep rendering tests pure by snapshotting view output rather than driving the full TUI. This task freezes the port target; it does not implement the new architecture yet.
